summary: Coach Quick Notes V1 - Complete Testing. Backend: 24/24 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All Quick Note features verified on Mission Control and Support Pod pages. Notes creation, category pills, save functionality, timeline display, and dismiss buttons all working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed bug: SupportPod.js line 143 used undefined 'refreshData' - changed to 'fetchPodData'
POST /api/athletes/{athlete_id}/notes creates note with text, category, created_by, created_by_name fields
Category validation: recruiting/event/parent/follow-up/other - invalid/empty defaults to 'other'
Returns 403 for athletes not assigned to the coach
GET /api/athletes/{athlete_id}/timeline returns notes in timeline.notes array with category and created_by_name
Notes stored in 'athlete_notes' collection (not 'notes') for onboarding log_activity detection
QuickNote component has compact mode (pen icon only) for Mission Control cards
QuickNote component has full mode (form visible) for Support Pod page
Treatment Timeline displays category badges for notes with categories other than 'other'
Close button (X) and Escape key both dismiss the Quick Note form
300 character limit enforced on frontend with character count display
All interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ prefixed notes in athlete_notes collection during backend testing. These are visible in athlete_1's timeline.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Quick Notes V1 fully verified. Key endpoints: POST /api/athletes/{athlete_id}/notes (creates note with text, category, created_by, created_by_name), GET /api/athletes/{athlete_id}/timeline (returns notes array with category and created_by_name). Frontend: QuickNote component (compact mode on Mission Control cards, full mode in Support Pod). Data-testid: quick-note-trigger-{athleteId}, quick-note-form-{athleteId}, quick-note-text, quick-note-cat-{category}, quick-note-save, quick-note-close. Treatment Timeline shows category badges (e.g., 'Recruiting', 'Follow-Up', 'Parent'). Valid categories: recruiting, event, parent, follow-up, other. Notes stored in 'athlete_notes' collection (NOT 'notes'). Onboarding log_activity auto-detection checks athlete_notes collection for created_by field.

backend_endpoints: POST /api/athletes/{athlete_id}/notes - creates note with all required fields ✓
POST /api/athletes/{athlete_id}/notes - defaults to 'other' when no category provided ✓
POST /api/athletes/{athlete_id}/notes - defaults to 'other' for invalid category ✓
POST /api/athletes/{athlete_id}/notes - director can create for any athlete ✓
GET /api/athletes/{athlete_id}/timeline - returns notes in notes array ✓
Onboarding log_activity detection checks athlete_notes collection ✓
Special characters and unicode handled correctly ✓
frontend_components: Quick Note trigger buttons appear on Mission Control athlete cards ✓
Quick Note trigger in compact mode (pen icon only) on Mission Control ✓
Form has textarea with placeholder text ✓
Form has 5 category pills: Recruiting, Event, Parent, Follow-up, Other ✓
Category pills toggle correctly (selection state visible) ✓
Save creates note and shows toast notification ✓
Quick Note form available in Support Pod page above timeline ✓
Support Pod has 'ADD NOTE' section with data-testid='pod-quick-note' ✓
Treatment Timeline shows notes with category badges ✓
Category badges styled with background and text (e.g., 'Recruiting', 'Follow-Up') ✓
Timeline filters work correctly (All, Notes, Assignments, Messages, Resolutions) ✓
